name: Droupadi Murmu
text: Droupadi Murmu is the 15th and current President of India since 25 July 2022. First tribal person and second woman to hold the office. Former Governor of Jharkhand (2015-2021). Succeeded Ram Nath Kovind. Born 20 June 1958 in Odisha.

name: Jagdeep Dhankhar
text: Jagdeep Dhankhar is the 14th and current Vice President of India and Chairman of the Rajya Sabha since 11 August 2022. Former Governor of West Bengal (2019-2022). Advocate and former Member of Parliament.

name: Narendra Modi
text: Narendra Modi is the 14th and current Prime Minister of India since 26 May 2014, serving his third consecutive term. Previously Chief Minister of Gujarat (2001-2014). Key initiatives: Digital India, Swachh Bharat, Make in India, Atmanirbhar Bharat.

name: Om Birla
text: Om Birla is the Speaker of the 18th Lok Sabha, re-elected on 26 June 2024. Previously Speaker of 17th Lok Sabha since 2019. MP from Kota, Rajasthan. Presides over Lok Sabha proceedings and maintains order.

name: Sanjiv Khanna
text: Sanjiv Khanna is the 51st and current Chief Justice of India since 11 November 2024. Succeeded Justice D.Y. Chandrachud. Heads the Supreme Court of India and is the highest judicial authority.

name: Rahul Gandhi
text: Rahul Gandhi is the Leader of Opposition in the 18th Lok Sabha since June 2024. MP from Rae Bareli, Uttar Pradesh. Former Congress President. First recognized Leader of Opposition since 2014.

name: Mallikarjun Kharge
text: Mallikarjun Kharge is the Leader of Opposition in the Rajya Sabha and President of the Indian National Congress. Long-standing parliamentary career spanning decades. Rajya Sabha member from Karnataka.

name: Rajnath Singh
text: Rajnath Singh is the current Minister of Defence since 30 May 2019. Former Home Minister and BJP President. MP from Lucknow. Focus: Modernization of armed forces and Make in India in defence sector.

name: Nirmala Sitharaman
text: Nirmala Sitharaman is the Minister of Finance and Corporate Affairs since 30 May 2019. Rajya Sabha member from Karnataka. First full-time woman Finance Minister. Presents the annual Union Budget.

name: Amit Shah
text: Amit Shah is the Minister of Home Affairs and Minister of Co-operation since 30 May 2019. MP from Gandhinagar, Gujarat. Key role: Internal security, border management, Article 370 abrogation, CAA implementation.

name: S. Jaishankar
text: Dr. Subrahmanyam Jaishankar is the Minister of External Affairs since 30 May 2019. Former Foreign Secretary of India. Rajya Sabha member from Gujarat. Focus: India First foreign policy and global strategic partnerships.

name: Girish Chandra Murmu
text: Girish Chandra Murmu is the Comptroller and Auditor General (CAG) of India since 8 August 2020. Former Lt. Governor of Jammu and Kashmir. The CAG audits all government expenditure and reports to Parliament.

name: R. Venkataramani
text: R. Venkataramani is the Attorney General of India since 1 October 2022. The Attorney General is the chief legal advisor to the Government of India and represents the Union in the Supreme Court.

name: Rajiv Kumar
text: Rajiv Kumar is the Chief Election Commissioner of India since May 2022. The Election Commission conducts all elections to Parliament, State Legislatures, and offices of President and Vice President.

name: Suman Bery
text: Suman Bery is Vice Chairman of NITI Aayog since May 2022. NITI Aayog (National Institution for Transforming India) replaced the Planning Commission in 2015. It serves as the government's policy think tank.
